reference: I have a pain that comes and goes in the left side of my abdomen, near my belly button. It feels like a feather turning in my abdomen; when it stops turning, the pain stops. However, now I am bleeding after I have been to the toilet through my anus. It is bright red blood each time, and this has been happening for the last three days. I just went, and I am still bleeding today, but it does not feel uncomfortable or sore or anything. I don’t know if it makes any difference, but I am a gay man.
text: I have a pain that comes and goes in the left side of my abdomen, near my belly button. It feels like a fever turning in my abdomen. When it stops turning, the pain stops. However, now I am bleeding after I have been to the toilet through my anus. It is bright red blood each time, and this has been happening for the last three days. I just went, and I am still bleeding today. But it does not feel uncomfortable or sore or anything. I don't know if it makes any difference, but I am a gay man.
